task_completion.description: Create a new tiddler titled 'Reagent Inventory'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler exists with the exact title 'Reagent Inventory' in the TiddlyWiki interface.

task_completion.description: Display the list of reagents in the dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rendered dashboard displays the names of the reagents (e.g., '1000uL Pipette Tips', '10x TBE Buffer', 'Taq DNA Polymerase').

task_completion.description: Sort the reagents alphabetically by title
task_completion.visual_evidence: The reagents in the dashboard are ordered alphabetically (e.g., starting with '1000uL Pipette Tips', then '10x TBE Buffer', 'Agarose Powder, LE', etc.).

task_completion.description: Show the current stock level and unit for each reagent
task_completion.visual_evidence: Next to or below each reagent name, there is a number representing the stock level and a string representing the unit (e.g., '5 boxes', '500 mL').

task_completion.description: Provide controls to increment and decrement the stock level
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rendered dashboard shows interactive buttons (like '+' and '-', or 'Up' and 'Down') next to each reagent.

task_completion.description: Use native TiddlyWiki action widgets and filter math in the source code
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the tiddler's edit mode (source code), look for the presence of '<$list', '<$button', '<$action-setfield', 'add[1]', and 'subtract[1]'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the TiddlyWiki web interface to create the dashboard
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using a web browser to navigate TiddlyWiki, clicking the 'New Tiddler' button, and typing in the editor, rather than just using terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent dynamically generated the list instead of hardcoding the reagents
integrity.visual_evidence: The tiddler's source code shows a filter like '<$list filter="[tag[Reagent]sort[title]]">' rather than statically typed names of the 6 reagents.

integrity.description: The agent saved and viewed the rendered dashboard
integrity.visual_evidence: There is at least one screenshot showing the 'Reagent Inventory' tiddler in view mode (not edit mode) with the buttons and list fully rendered.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected dashboard title is exactly 'Reagent Inventory'. The 6 reagents that should be dynamically displayed are: '1000uL Pipette Tips', '10x TBE Buffer', 'Agarose Powder, LE', 'Ethidium Bromide (10mg/mL)', 'Nuclease-Free Water', and 'Taq DNA Polymerase'. The dashboard's source code must contain the native TiddlyWiki widgets '<$list>', '<$button>', and '<$action-setfield>', as well as the math filter operators 'add[1]' and 'subtract[1]'.
